title: Add phx-update=stream to a stream container
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/live/products_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ProductsLive). Its render must contain
wrapping
{p.name}
. mount/3 must call stream(socket, :products, []). Without phx-update="stream" the DOM won't diff correctly.
tier_rationale: Three required container attributes in one place. Single canonical fix.
research_citation: Phoenix.LiveView docs: 'parent element of the list must have a unique id attribute and phx-update="stream"'
